description: Standalone installer and uninstaller for the classic 'Open with Code' right-click entries. Surgical: uninstall touches only paths listed in config.json.

messages.scriptDisabled: Installer is disabled in config (set 'enabled': true).
messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.editionUnknown: Unknown edition '{name}' in enabledEditions -- no editions.{name} block in config -- skipping.
messages.exeMissing: VS Code executable not found at: {path} -- skipping edition '{name}'.
messages.uninstallStart: Uninstall: surgical removal using path allow-list from config.json.
messages.summaryUninstall: Uninstall summary -- keys removed: {removed}, already absent: {absent}, failed: {failed}.
messages.tip: Tip: re-run with -Edition <stable|insiders> to target a single edition.
messages.checkStart: Quick verification: reading HKCR\*\shell, HKCR\Directory\shell, HKCR\Directory\Background\shell (read-only)...
messages.auditWritten: Audit log written: {path} (one JSONL record per registry change -- safe to grep, diff, or tail)
messages.snapshotWritten: Pre-install snapshot saved: {path} (manual restore: reg.exe import "<path>")
messages.snapshotSkipped: Pre-install snapshot was NOT created (failure: see preceding warnings; install will continue)
messages.repairStart: Repair: ensuring folder + folder-background entries, removing file-target entry, stripping suppression hints, sweeping legacy duplicates.

commands.install: [ADMIN] Write the file/folder/background context-menu entries for every enabled edition. Writes to HKCR -- requires elevation.
commands.uninstall: [ADMIN] Surgical removal: deletes ONLY the keys listed in config.json::registryPaths. Never touches sibling keys.
commands.repair: [ADMIN] Make the menu appear on FOLDERS + folder background but NOT on files. Re-asserts directory + background keys, deletes the file-target key, strips suppression values (ProgrammaticAccessOnly, AppliesTo, NoWorkingDirectory), sweeps legacy duplicates listed in config.repair.legacyNames.
commands.rollback: [ADMIN] Alias for 'uninstall' (surgical delete). Also prints the path of the most recent pre-install snapshot so you can manually `reg.exe import` it to restore third-party entries.
commands.check: [no-admin] Quick read-only registry check. Reports PASS/MISS for file, folder, and background entries per edition. Exit 0=all pass, 1=one or more miss, 2=config missing.
commands.verify: [no-admin] Full read-only test harness (leaf existence + command template). Accepts -Edition, -OnlyTargets, -OnlyCases, -NoColor.
commands.sync: [scope-aware] Auto-detect the current VS Code exe (config path > PATH shim > Programs folders > uninstall registry) and rewrite any registered \command whose exe path drifted (VS Code moved, upgraded, reinstalled, or wrong folder). Skips keys that are already in sync. Pass --dry-run to preview without writing.

parameters.-Edition: Limit the run to one edition: 'stable' or 'insiders'. Default: every edition listed in config.enabledEditions.
parameters.-VsCodePath: [install only] Override the configured Code.exe path. Useful for portable installs (e.g. 'D:\VSI\Code.exe').
parameters.-OnlyTargets: [verify only] Comma-separated targets to test: file,directory,background. Default: all three.
parameters.-OnlyCases: [verify only] Comma-separated test-case numbers to run (e.g. 1,4). Default: full suite.
parameters.-NoColor: [verify only] Disable ANSI colour output -- useful for CI logs.
parameters.-Scope: [install/uninstall/repair/sync] Which Windows registry hive to write/read. 'Auto' (default) picks AllUsers when elevated, else CurrentUser. 'CurrentUser' writes to HKCU\Software\Classes (no admin needed, current user only). 'AllUsers' writes to HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT i.e. HKLM\Software\Classes (every user on the box, requires admin).
parameters.-Help: Print this help and exit. Combine with the master dispatcher: .\run.ps1 -I 54 -Help

examples: # --- install (ADMIN -- right-click PowerShell -> Run as Administrator) ---
# --- install with explicit -Scope (controls which registry hive is written) ---
# Auto: AllUsers when elevated, otherwise CurrentUser (default if -Scope is omitted)
# CurrentUser: writes only to HKCU\Software\Classes -- no admin required, only the current user sees the menu
# AllUsers: writes to HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT (HKLM\Software\Classes) -- every user sees the menu, REQUIRES elevation
# --- uninstall (ADMIN -- surgical, only paths listed in config.json) ---
# --- uninstall with explicit -Scope (must match the scope used at install time) ---
# Auto: removes from whichever hive matches your current elevation
# CurrentUser: removes ONLY the per-user entries from HKCU\Software\Classes (no admin)
# AllUsers: removes the machine-wide entries from HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT (REQUIRES elevation)
# --- repair (ADMIN -- folders YES, files NO; cleans up legacy + suppression hints) ---
# --- repair with explicit -Scope (repairs the same hive the install wrote to) ---
# Auto: repairs AllUsers when elevated, otherwise CurrentUser
# CurrentUser: re-asserts per-user keys in HKCU\Software\Classes (no admin)
# AllUsers: re-asserts machine-wide keys in HKEY_CLASSES_ROOT (REQUIRES elevation)
# --- rollback (ADMIN -- surgical delete + points you at the pre-install snapshot) ---
# Manual full restore (importing the snapshot brings back any pre-existing third-party entries):
# --- check (no admin -- quick PASS/MISS, exit code drives CI) ---
